header.headline: Tokenizer Architecture
header.subtitle: Tokenizer systems are architecture maps once the questions become vocabulary flow, staging, and runtime lookup.

corpus.title: Corpus Inputs
corpus.body: Text corpora define the surface the tokenizer needs to absorb and compress.

train.title: Tokenizer Train
train.body: Training turns corpus pressure into stable vocabulary and merges.

stage.title: Run Staging
stage.body: The trained tokenizer is staged into the run so generation stays consistent.

runtime.title: Runtime Lookup
runtime.body: Encoding and decoding depend on that staged contract at training and eval time.

outcome.title: Stable Surface
outcome.body: The architecture is successful when training, probing, and inference share the same token contract.

footer.note: Tokenizer architecture matters because every other deterministic contract sits on top of it.
